query: Does WastewaterSCAN dashboard test for West Nile Virus and Mpox clade 1b? Is West Nile Virus detected in US wastewater during summer months July-August 2025 and 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the findings:

**Does WastewaterSCAN test for West Nile Virus and Mpox clade 1b?**
- **Yes to both.** WNV monitoring began mid-October 2025; Mpox clade Ib ("1b") monitoring began mid-December 2024 (tracked separately from Mpox clade II). Both are confirmed on the pathogens page and in the monthly nationwide newsletters.

**WNV detected in US wastewater July–August 2025?**
- **No dashboard data exists** for that window — WastewaterSCAN's WNV monitoring didn't launch until mid-October 2025. (A separate retrospective study did detect WNV in US wastewater during summer/fall 2023 at three plants, confirming WNV is detectable in wastewater during its late-summer/early-fall peak.)

**WNV detected in US wastewater July–August 2026?**
- **That period is in the future** relative to available data (today is July 4, 2026). The latest newsletter covers data through May 30, 2026, which showed 1 WNV detection in May 2026 and 139 sites NOT-DETECTED nationally. Summer 2026 will be the first full season WastewaterSCAN monitors WNV prospectively nationwide.

All findings, sources, and quantitative data points have been captured in the structured output.

sources.title: Pathogens We Monitor - WastewaterSCAN
sources.snippet: Monitored pathogens include Influenza, RSV, SARS-CoV-2, HMPV, Norovirus GII, Enterovirus D68, Mpox, C. auris, Hepatitis A, Measles, West Nile Virus, Parvovirus B19, Rotavirus.

sources.title: Nationwide WastewaterSCAN May 2026 Update
sources.snippet: Targets include Mpox clade Ib, Mpox clade II, and West Nile Virus. WNV prospective monitoring began mid-October 2025; Mpox clade Ib began mid-December 2024. WNV nationally NOT-DETECTED, 1 positive in May 2026, 139 sites not-detected.

sources.title: Nationwide WastewaterSCAN October 2025 Update
sources.snippet: WNV prospective monitoring began mid-October 2025; no summer 2025 data. All 135 qualifying sites NOT-DETECTED in October 2025.

sources.title: Nationwide WastewaterSCAN December 2025 Update
sources.snippet: 1 WNV positive detection in Iowa in December 2025; 121 sites NOT-DETECTED; no retrospective summer 2025 analysis.

sources.title: West Nile Virus (Orthoflavivirus nilense) RNA concentrations in wastewater solids at five wastewater treatment plants in the United States
sources.snippet: WNV RNA detected in summer/fall 2023 at Sacramento (2/60, 3.3%), Woodland (3/51, 5.9%), Lincoln NE (4/31, 13%); no detection at San Jose or Oceanside.

sources.title: Current Year Data (2026) | West Nile Virus | CDC
sources.snippet: ArboNET national arboviral surveillance; current-season data updated every 1-2 weeks June through December.

data_points.metric: WastewaterSCAN Mpox clade Ib monitoring start
WNV sites in NOT-DETECTED category, May 2026
WNV wastewater positivity rate, Lincoln NE, summer/fall 2023 (retrospective study)
WNV wastewater positivity rate, Woodland CA, summer/fall 2023 (retrospective study)
WNV wastewater positivity rate, Sacramento CA, summer/fall 2023 (retrospective study)
